department_name: Department of Civil Engineering and Geomatics
hub_subtitle: Central access point for the CUT geotechnical software suite.
contact_text:
Associate Professor Lysandros Pantelidis
Department of Civil Engineering and Geomatics
Cyprus University of Technology
lysandros.pantelidis@cut.ac.cy

web_applications.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
web_applications.description: Bearing-capacity tool for shallow foundations, including soil compressibility, groundwater conditions, seismic loading, reinforcement effects, and one-layer / two-layer soil cases.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT K Coulomb
web_applications.description: Coulomb earth-pressure tool for any backslope geometry, developed primarily as a supporting program for CUT Bearing Capacity.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT K Rankine
web_applications.description: Rankine earth-pressure tool for smooth vertical walls.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit
web_applications.description: Seismic earth-pressure analysis and comparison tool (EN 1998-5, prEN 1998-5, AASHTO, CUT) with layered soils, groundwater, surcharge, and pressure distributions.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: CUT Rock Key
web_applications.description: Interactive rock-identification tool based on the original Rock Identification Key by Don Peck, adapted as a bilingual educational web application for step-by-step identification using observable rock properties.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

web_applications.title: jWinkler (CUT)
web_applications.description: Interactive web-based tool for the analysis of beams on elastic foundation using the Winkler model. The application allows definition of geometry, materials, cross-sections, and loads, and provides displacement, moment, shear, and soil pressure diagrams along with tabulated results.
web_applications.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access. No installation required.

desktop_programs.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT Bearing Capacity program for local execution on Windows systems.
desktop_programs.note: Recommended for offline use and local distribution.

desktop_programs.title: CUT K Coulomb
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT K Coulomb program for local Windows use.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for local classroom, lab, or office installation.

desktop_programs.title: CUT K Rankine
desktop_programs.description: Rankine earth-pressure tool for direct evaluation of the active and passive coefficients as functions of soil friction angle and backfill angle, with integrated teaching notes on the limitations of the classical expressions for sloping backfill.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for desktop and mobile access.

desktop_programs.title: CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT Seismic Earth Pressure Toolkit for local execution on Windows systems.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for local classroom, lab, office, and offline use.

desktop_programs.title: CUT Rock Key
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the CUT Rock Key program for local execution on Windows systems.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for classroom, lab, office, and offline educational use.

desktop_programs.title: jWinkler (CUT)
desktop_programs.description: Standalone desktop version of the jWinkler program for local execution on Windows systems, providing beam-on-elastic-foundation analysis with full graphical output.
desktop_programs.note: Suitable for classroom, lab, office, and offline educational and research use.

documentation.title: CUT Bearing Capacity
documentation.description: User manual, supporting documentation, and references for the CUT Bearing Capacity program.

references.text: Pantelidis, L. (2026). Unified pseudo-static seismic reduction factors for shallow foundations via an earth-pressure framework. Soils and Foundations, 66(1), 101713. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.sandf.2025.101713

Pantelidis, L. (2023). Bearing capacity of centrically-vertically loaded strip foundations based on soil parameters: A classical earth pressure analysis problem. Research Square (Preprint, Version 2). https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-2940474/v2

Pantelidis, L. (2024). Bearing capacity of shallow foundations: A focus on the depth factors in combination with the respective N-factors. Arabian Journal of Geosciences, 17(6), 169. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12517-024-11976-7

Pantelidis, L., & Meddah, A. (2024). The effect of loading inclination and eccentricity on the bearing capacity of shallow foundations: A review. Archives of Computational Methods in Engineering, 31, 4189–4208. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11831-024-10113-7

Pantelidis, L., Assefa, E., & Sachpazis, C. I. (2025). The effect of footing shape on the bearing capacity of shallow foundations: A review. Archives of Computational Methods in Engineering, 32, 1597–1617. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11831-024-10184-6

Pantelidis, L., & Meddah, A. (2026). Theoretical investigation of the effect of soil compressibility in the context of the bearing capacity of shallow foundations. Proceedings of the 21st International Conference on Soil Mechanics and Geotechnical Engineering (Vienna, Austria, June 14–19, 2026).

Pantelidis, L., Assefa, E., & Sachpazis, C. (2026). The effect of groundwater table on the bearing capacity of shallow foundations: An earth pressure analysis approach. Proceedings of the 21st International Conference on Soil Mechanics and Geotechnical Engineering (Vienna, Austria, June 14–19, 2026).
